(not the JRE): http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/java/javase/downloads/index.html Install the CapeCode installer: https://github.com/icyphy/ptII/releases/download/nightly/capecode0_2_devel_setup_windows_64.exe Optional dependencies Python2 is needed

ows_64.exe Optional dependencies Python2 is needed if you want to use the Node OpenCV camera Node.js module: https://www.python.org/downloads/windows/ In June, 2017, we used Python 2.7.13 Detailed instructions for how to install CapeCode under Window

tructions for how to install CapeCode under Windows JDK Install the Oracle 1.8 JDK (not the JRE): http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/java/javase/downloads/index.html The Oracle JDK is needed because CapeCode uses Nashorn, which is present in Java1.8 S

peCode uses Nashorn, which is present in Java1.8 See Also Notes about Windows and CapeCode Ptolemy II - general notes for installing Ptolemy II Back to the CapeCode Host Retrieved from https://wiki.eecs.berkeley.edu/accessors/Main/CapeCodeWindowsInst
